ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tumors" (
  "tumor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the tumor assessment */,
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the diagnosis code */,
  "tumor_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tumor type */,
  "radius_mean" REAL /* Mean radius of the tumor */,
  "texture_mean" REAL /* Mean texture of the tumor */,
  "perimeter_mean" REAL /* Mean perimeter of the tumor */,
  "area_mean" REAL /* Mean area of the tumor */,
  "smoothness_mean" REAL /* Mean smoothness of the tumor */,
  "compactness_mean" REAL /* Mean compactness of the tumor */,
  "concavity_mean" REAL /* Mean concavity of the tumor */,
  "concave_points_mean" REAL /* Mean concave points of the tumor */,
  "symmetry_mean" REAL /* Mean symmetry of the tumor */,
  "fractal_dimension_mean" REAL /* Mean fractal dimension of the tumor */,
  "radius_se" REAL /* Standard error of the radius */,
  "texture_se" REAL /* Standard error of the texture */,
  "perimeter_se" REAL /* Standard error of the perimeter */,
  "area_se" REAL /* Standard error of the area */,
  "smoothness_se" REAL /* Standard error of the smoothness */,
  "compactness_se" REAL /* Standard error of the compactness */,
  "concavity_se" REAL /* Standard error of the concavity */,
  "concave_points_se" REAL /* Standard error of the concave points */,
  "symmetry_se" REAL /* Standard error of the symmetry */,
  "fractal_dimension_se" REAL /* Standard error of the fractal dimension */,
  "radius_worst" REAL /* Worst radius of the tumor */,
  "texture_worst" REAL /* Worst texture of the tumor */,
  "perimeter_worst" REAL /* Worst perimeter of the tumor */,
  "area_worst" REAL /* Worst area of the tumor */,
  "smoothness_worst" REAL /* Worst smoothness of the tumor */,
  "compactness_worst" REAL /* Worst compactness of the tumor */,
  "concavity_worst" REAL /* Worst concavity of the tumor */,
  "concave_points_worst" REAL /* Worst concave points of the tumor */,
  "symmetry_worst" REAL /* Worst symmetry of the tumor */,
  "fractal_dimension_worst" REAL /* Worst fractal dimension of the tumor */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "imaging_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the imaging data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the tumor assessment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the tumor assessment was last updated */,
  "clinical_notes" TEXT /* Additional clinical notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tumor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tumors_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tumors_tumor_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("tumor_type_id") REFERENCES tumor_types ("tumor_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tumors_imaging_id FOREIGN KEY ("imaging_id") REFERENCES imaging ("imaging_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tumors_diagnosis_id FOREIGN KEY ("diagnosis_id") REFERENCES diagnoses ("diagnosis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the patient record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the patient record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnoses" (
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_code" TEXT /* Code representing the diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_description" TEXT /* Description of the diagnosis */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the diagnosis code is currently in use */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the diagnosis code was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the diagnosis code was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tumor_types" (
  "tumor_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tumor type */,
  "tumor_type" TEXT /* Type of the tumor (e.g., malignant, benign) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tumor type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tumor type is currently in use */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the tumor type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the tumor type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tumor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_plans" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment plan */,
  "tumor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tumor being treated */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient receiving treatment */,
  "treatment_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment (e.g., chemotherapy, radiation) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment */,
  "success_rate" REAL /* Success rate of the treatment */,
  "treatment_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments related to the treatment plan */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the treatment plan was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the treatment plan was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_plans_tumor_id FOREIGN KEY ("tumor_id") REFERENCES tumors ("tumor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_plans_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinical_trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clinical trial */,
  "tumor_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tumor type being studied */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient participating in the trial */,
  "trial_name" TEXT /* Name of the clinical trial */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trial */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trial */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the trial */,
  "trial_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments related to the clinical trial */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the clinical trial was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the clinical trial was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clinical_trials_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clinical_trials_tumor_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("tumor_type_id") REFERENCES tumor_types ("tumor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "follow_ups" (
  "follow_up_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow-up assessment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient being assessed */,
  "tumor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tumor associated with the follow-up */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date of the follow-up assessment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the patient (e.g., clear, under observation) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the follow-up assessment */,
  "follow_up_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments related to the follow-up */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the follow-up was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the follow-up was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follow_up_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follow_ups_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follow_ups_tumor_id FOREIGN KEY ("tumor_id") REFERENCES tumors ("tumor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient receiving the medication */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the treatment plan associated with the medication */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "dose" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of medication administration */,
  "prescription_date" TEXT /* Date the medication was prescribed */,
  "prescribed_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who prescribed the medication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the medication entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the medication entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_prescribed_by FOREIGN KEY ("prescribed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES treatment_plans ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, clinician) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to perform the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "imaging" (
  "imaging_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each imaging record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "tumor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tumor */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the medical imaging data */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of imaging (e.g., MRI, CT) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the imaging data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the imaging data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("imaging_id")
)
